app.title: ZPass
welcome.heading: Welcome to ZPass
welcome.subtitle: Your local, zero-knowledge password vault.
onboarding.heading: Create your vault
onboarding.subtitle: Choose a strong master password. It will never leave this device.
onboarding.error.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
unlock.heading: Unlock vault
unlock.subtitle: Enter your master password to continue.
vault.title: Vault
vault.empty: No items yet. Create your first login below.
vault.item.name: Name
vault.detail.empty: Select an item to view details.
totp.title: TOTP codes
totp.subtitle: All time-based one-time codes from your vault.
generator.title: Generator
generator.subtitle: Generate strong passwords. Entirely local.
importExport.title: Import & Export
importExport.subtitle: Import plaintext JSON or export a snapshot.
